headline: MSCI Publishes Investor Presentation
summary: NEW YORK, June 15, 2026--MSCI Inc. ("MSCI" or the "Company") (NYSE: MSCI) published an investor presentation for investors and analysts on its Investor Relations homepage, ir.msci.com, on Monday, June 15, 2026. The Company’s management may use this presentation during meetings with investors and analysts.
